hero.title: SUNSSE BARU INDONESIA
hero.subtitle: Global Supply of Starch, Sweeteners, and Industrial Solutions

mission.label: mission
description: To supply high-quality and innovative industrial machinery and equipment.
To enhance customer productivity through efficient and sustainable technical solutions.
To provide responsive and professional after-sales service.
To build long-term partnerships based on trust and integrity.

vision.label: vision
description: To become a leading company — professional and experienced manufacturer of industrial machinery and equipment, specializing in delivering complete and integrated processing line solutions for tapioca, corn, sago, and sweetener factories to clients in Indonesia and around the world with international standards, focusing on quality, efficiency and customer satisfaction.

PT Sunsse Baru Indonesia is a professional and experienced manufacturer of industrial machinery and equipment, specializing in delivering complete and integrated processing line solutions for tapioca, corn, sago, and sweetener factories to clients around the world. Sunsse is a professional equipment and turn-label engineering solution provider for Starch and Starch derivatives (also like other sweeteners, sugar alcohol, and organic acid) projects.

With over three decades of engineering expertise, we design, fabricate, and deliver high-performance machines that power large-scale agricultural and food processing plants across Asia, Europe, and beyond, ensuring reliability, efficiency, and long-term operational excellence.

Our dedicated team of skilled engineers and technical specialists ensures that every machine we produce meets the highest international quality standards — meticulously designed to last, precisely engineered to perform, and fully supported throughout its operational lifespan.

lists.label: Tapioca/Cassava Starch Machines
lists.slogan: Reliable starch. Scalable growth. Supporting your industry with consistent quality and flexibility.

overview.label: Overview
description: Cassava starch is a highly versatile raw material, widely used in vermicelli production and essential for producing high-quality modified starch across industries such as paper, textile, food, and pharmaceuticals. It can also be processed into value-added sweeteners like glucose, fructose, and maltose, making it a reliable solution for food, beverage, and health product manufacturers.

Engineered for efficiency and built for industry, our solutions deliver consistent cassava starch performance for scalable production. With its adaptability and stable quality, cassava starch supports higher efficiency, improved product quality, and long-term growth.

component.label: Machine Components
description: We supply complete tapioca and cassava starch processing lines — from raw cassava root washing all the way through to final dried starch packaging. Each system is engineered for high throughput, minimal waste, and food-grade output standards.
list: Feeding hopper, belt conveyor & cutting machines
Fine fiber sieve & desander separation
Paddle washing machine & sifter sieve
Full turnlabel plant design & installation available
Rasper for cell-breaking & starch extraction
Hydrocyclone starch purification systems
Flash dryer & dry sieve for final product

lists.label: Cornstarch Machines
lists.slogan: Precision milling. Consistent starch. Delivering quality from kernel to final product.

overview.label: Overview
description: Corn starch is one of the most widely used industrial starches, serving as a label raw material in food, pharmaceutical, textile, and paper industries. It can be further processed into high-value derivatives such as glucose syrup, fructose, maltodextrin, and modified starch, making it an essential input for a broad range of manufacturing processes.

Our corn starch processing solutions are engineered for high efficiency and consistent output, supporting scalable production with stable quality. From wet milling to drying and packaging, our systems are built to maximize yield while minimizing energy and water consumption.

component.label: Machine Components
description: We provide complete corn starch wet milling and processing lines — from raw corn kernel cleaning through to final dried starch packaging. Each system is designed for high throughput, minimal waste, and food-grade output standards.
list: Corn cleaning & steeping tanks
Fine grinding mill & fiber washing system
Hydrocyclone starch washing & concentration
Full turnlabel plant design & installation available
Degerminator & germ separator
Gluten separation & centrifuge purification
Flash dryer & dry sieve for final product

lists.label: Sweetener Machines
lists.slogan: From starch to sweetness — precision-engineered lines for every sweetener grade and scale.

overview.label: Overview
description: Sweetener processing machines are purpose-built systems for converting starch — primarily corn or cassava starch — into a wide spectrum of refined sweeteners including maltodextrin, maltose syrup, glucose syrup, and high-fructose corn syrup (HFCS). These products are integral to food and beverage manufacturing, confectionery, pharmaceuticals, and fermentation industries worldwide.

Our sweetener processing lines leverage advanced enzymatic hydrolysis, ion-exchange purification, and multi-effect evaporation technologies to deliver sweeteners with precise DE values, high clarity, and consistent sweetness profiles. Each plant is engineered for full automation, hygienic operation, and scalable output — from pilot-scale to full industrial capacity.

component.label: Machine Components
description: We provide complete turnlabel sweetener production lines covering all stages from starch slurry preparation to final product packaging — engineered for food-grade quality and continuous high-volume output.
list: Starch slurry preparation & dosing tanks
Jet cooker / liquefaction reactor (enzymatic)
Saccharification & isomerization vessels
Plate & frame filter press for deproteinization
Activated carbon decolorization columns
Ion exchange resin columns for demineralization
Multi-effect evaporator & vacuum concentrator
Crystallization tanks & centrifugal separators
Spray dryer / fluidized bed dryer (for powder output)
Full turnlabel plant design & installation available

lists.label: Sweetener Products (Maltodextrine, Maltose, Glucose, Fructose)
lists.slogan: Pure. Consistent. Versatile — sweetener products engineered to perform in every application.

overview.label: Overview
description: We supply a comprehensive range of starch-derived sweetener products, manufactured to food-grade and industrial-grade standards. Our sweeteners are produced through controlled enzymatic hydrolysis and purification processes, ensuring consistent purity, stable DE values, and reliable performance across every batch.

Whether you require a low-sweetness bulking agent, a highly fermentable glucose syrup, or a high-intensity fructose sweetener, our product portfolio covers the full spectrum of sweetener grades — suitable for beverages, confectionery, baked goods, pharmaceuticals, and fermentation applications.

component.label: Product Range
description: Our sweetener product lineup includes four core categories, each available in customizable DE values, concentrations, and packaging formats:
list: Maltodextrin — Low DE (DE 5-20), water-soluble powder; used as a bulking agent, carrier, and spray-dry aid in food and pharma
Maltose Syrup — High maltose content (40-75%); mild sweetness, excellent heat stability, ideal for candy, ice cream & bakery
Glucose Syrup (DE 42 / DE 63) — Versatile liquid sweetener; used in confectionery, beverages, canning & fermentation
Fructose Syrup (HFCS 42 / HFCS 55) — High sweetness, low viscosity; widely used in soft drinks, juice & dairy applications

lists.label: Liquid Syrup
lists.slogan: Fluid. Functional. Flavourful — liquid syrups crafted for precision performance at every production scale.

overview.label: Overview
description: Our liquid syrup product line delivers a versatile range of ready-to-use sweetening and functional solutions, developed through advanced starch hydrolysis and sugar inversion processes. Designed to meet the evolving needs of food, beverage, pharmaceutical, and industrial applications, our syrups ensure consistent Brix levels, controlled viscosity, and reliable shelf stability.

From standard corn syrup for confectionery to high-purity sorbitol solutions for pharmaceutical and cosmetic use, each product is precisely formulated to support efficient and scalable production. Available in bulk tanker, IBC tote, and drum packaging, our solutions integrate seamlessly into your processing line.
Produced in hygienic facilities and backed by certified quality management systems, we guarantee safe, consistent, and high-performance products for your business.
Partner with us to optimize your production and elevate your product value. 👉 Contact us today to discuss your requirements.

component.label: Product Range
description: Our liquid syrup lineup covers four label product types, each available in customizable Brix concentrations, purity grades, and packaging options:
list: Corn Syrup — Standard DE 42/63 liquid glucose derived from corn starch; widely used in candy, bakery, canning, and brewing as a fermentable sweetener and humectant
Invert Sugar Syrup — 50/50 glucose-fructose blend from sucrose inversion; high sweetness, excellent moisture retention, ideal for beverages, jams & soft-centred confectionery
Caramel Syrup — Heat-treated liquid caramel; provides consistent colour, flavour and mild sweetness; used in sauces, bakery glazes, beverages & dairy products
Sorbitol Syrup (70%) — Food-grade polyol solution; low-calorie, non-cariogenic; used in confectionery, pharmaceuticals, personal care & moisture-controlled food products

lists.label: Liquid Syrup Machines
lists.slogan: Engineered. Hygienic. Scalable — complete syrup processing lines built to match your production ambitions.

overview.label: Overview
description: Our liquid syrup machine line delivers a complete range of industrial-grade processing equipment engineered for the production of glucose syrup, invert sugar, caramel, sorbitol, and related liquid sweetener products. Each system is designed to meet the evolving demands of food, beverage, pharmaceutical, and industrial manufacturers — ensuring precise process control, hygienic operation, and consistent output quality.

From raw starch cooking and enzyme dosing through to multi-effect evaporation and automated filling, every machine in our lineup is built for efficiency, scalability, and long-term reliability. Our modular system approach allows flexible integration into new or existing production facilities of any capacity.

All equipment is fabricated from food-grade stainless steel, compliant with international hygiene and safety standards, and supported by our full after-sales service network including installation, commissioning, training, and spare parts supply.

component.label: Machine Range
description: Our liquid syrup machine lineup covers the full production process, with each unit available in customizable capacities and automation levels:
list: Syrup Cooking & Mixing System — Stainless steel jacketed vessels with agitators for dissolving, liquefying and enzyme-treating starch slurry; available in batch or continuous configurations
Filtration & Clarification Unit — Plate-and-frame or membrane filter press systems for removing impurities, activated carbon decolourisation, and ion exchange resin purification
Evaporation & Concentration Plant — Single or multi-effect falling-film evaporators for concentrating syrup to target Brix; energy-efficient design with steam economy up to 4x
Filling & Packaging Line — Automated filling systems for bulk tankers, IBC totes, drums, and bottles; integrated with CIP (clean-in-place) and flow metering for accurate fill weights

lists.label: Food Grade Rice Protein Machines
lists.slogan: Pure. Functional. Scalable — complete rice protein processing lines built for the growing plant-based nutrition market.

overview.label: Overview
description: Our food-grade rice protein machine line provides a complete set of industrial processing equipment engineered for the extraction, purification, and drying of high-purity rice protein isolate and concentrate. Designed to meet the growing demand in nutraceutical, sports nutrition, infant formula, and plant-based food industries, each system ensures consistent protein yield with clean-label compliance.

The process integrates wet milling, enzymatic hydrolysis, centrifugal separation, ultrafiltration, and spray drying into a seamless and hygienic production flow. Our modular engineering approach allows flexible configurations—from pilot-scale units to full commercial lines with capacities exceeding several tonnes per day.

All equipment is manufactured using food-grade materials, fully compatible with CIP/SIP systems, and built to comply with international food safety standards such as FDA, EU, and Halal requirements. Comprehensive after-sales support includes installation, operator training, and ongoing technical assistance.

In addition to supplying advanced processing equipment, we also provide high-quality rice protein products—featuring high protein content, excellent nutritional value, and consistent premium quality to meet diverse market needs.

component.label: Machine Range
description: Our rice protein machine lineup covers the complete extraction-to-packaging process, with each unit available in customizable capacities and automation levels:
list: Rice Protein Extraction System — Wet milling and slurry preparation units for breaking down rice flour or bran into a homogeneous protein-starch slurry; includes dosing systems for enzyme and pH adjustment reagents
Enzymatic Hydrolysis Reactor — Temperature-controlled jacketed reactors for alpha-amylase and protease enzyme treatment; precise pH and temperature monitoring for optimal protein yield and purity

Centrifugal Separation & Ultrafiltration Unit — Decanter centrifuges and tubular membrane ultrafiltration systems for separating protein from starch, fibre, and process water; achievable protein purity of 80–90%+

Spray Dryer Tower — High-efficiency spray drying systems converting protein concentrate into free-flowing powder; adjustable inlet/outlet temperatures and atomizer speeds for particle size and moisture control
Packaging & Bagging Line — Automated weighing, filling, and sealing systems for bags, pouches, and bulk sacks; integrated with nitrogen flushing and metal detection for food safety compliance

list.name: Rasper Machine
list.description: The rasper machine is the label equipment in the potato/cassava starch production line, which determines the extraction rate of starch. The higher the rotational speed, the finer the material is broken down, resulting in a higher starch free rate and extraction rate. All parts are made of stainless steel, available in direct-coupled and belt-drive forms. The rotor is forged from stainless steel for high strength. The unique rotor groove design makes saw blade replacement easy. Saw blades are made from special high-hardness, wear-resistant material. The rotor rotates in both directions and the saw blades are interchangeable in both directions, extending the working life of the machine and reducing operating costs.

list.name: Rasper / Saw Blade
list.description: Replacement saw blades for rasper machines, manufactured from high-carbon hardened steel for maximum durability and cutting efficiency. Designed to withstand the abrasive and high-moisture conditions of raw cassava processing. Available in various tooth profiles and sizes to fit different rasper drum configurations.

list.name: Holder Saw Blade
list.description: Heavy-duty blade holder/carrier strips used to mount and secure saw blades onto the rasper drum. Precision-engineered for tight blade spacing and even load distribution, ensuring consistent rasping performance and reduced vibration during high-speed operation.

list.name: ESP Pump (Chemical Centrifugal Pump)
list.description: ESP series chemical centrifugal pump designed for transferring corrosive process liquids including sulfuric acid, sodium hydroxide, and other chemical reagents used in starch and sweetener processing. Constructed with corrosion-resistant materials; available in various flow rates and head configurations.

list.name: ZJB Pump (Fiber Pump)
list.description: The ZJB series fiber pump is a single-stage direct-coupled centrifugal pump developed to meet industry demand for conveying media containing fibrous material of a certain length. The spiral inducer design at the pump inlet significantly improves the pump's media conveying capacity. Direct drive via the extended motor shaft increases working efficiency and ensures smoother, more stable operation. Widely used in paper, chemical, starch, and environmental industries for transferring media containing fibrous material and solid suspensions.

list.name: XMB Pump (Defoaming Pump)
list.description: XMB series defoaming pump engineered for handling foam-prone process liquids in starch, syrup, and protein production. The unique impeller geometry breaks down foam during pumping, eliminating the need for separate defoaming agents in many applications and ensuring stable, continuous flow.

list.name: FBZ Pump (Self-Priming Centrifugal Pump)
list.description: FBZ series self-priming centrifugal pump capable of re-priming automatically without manual intervention. Ideal for applications where the pump is installed above the liquid level, including tank drainage, slurry transfer, and process liquid recirculation in starch and sweetener plants. Handles liquids containing small solids and air pockets.

list.name: FVP Pump (Food Grade Centrifugal Pump)
list.description: The FVP series food grade centrifugal pump is manufactured to the highest hygiene standards for use in food, beverage, dairy, and starch processing industries. Constructed entirely from SS316L stainless steel with food-grade seals, it is fully CIP/SIP compatible. Smooth internal surfaces prevent bacterial build-up, ensuring clean and safe transfer of food-grade liquids including syrups, protein concentrates, and starch slurries.

list.name: Sanitary Centrifugal Pump
list.description: The sanitary centrifugal pump is designed specifically for hygienic process applications in food, pharmaceutical, and biotechnology industries. Features a crevice-free, polished internal surface finish to prevent contamination and facilitate thorough cleaning. Fully compliant with GMP, FDA, and EHEDG hygienic design standards. Suitable for transferring sensitive process liquids such as glucose syrup, rice protein solution, and other food-grade media requiring strict sanitary conditions.

lists.title: Machine Design & Engineering
lists.description: Custom design and engineering of industrial processing machinery tailored to your factory needs—from concept development to complete technical drawings and system integration. Our solutions are engineered for reliability, efficiency, and long-term performance, helping you optimize production, improve consistency, and scale your operations with confidence.

lists.title: Equipment Manufacturing
lists.description: We deliver high-precision, modern processing equipment for tapioca, corn starch, CPO, and sweetener plants—engineered for reliable performance and continuous industrial operation. In addition, we provide complete production lines along with a full range of motors and milling machines, tailored to meet your specific industrial requirements and support your business growth.

lists.title: Complete Factory Line
lists.description: We supply and install complete end-to-end processing lines for agricultural factories — fully integrated, tested, and ready for production.

lists.title: Installation & Commissioning
lists.description: Professional on-site installation, testing, and commissioning of all machinery and equipment to ensure optimal performance from day one.

lists.title: After-Sales & Maintenance
lists.description: Comprehensive after-sales support including spare parts supply, preventive maintenance, technical training, and emergency repair services worldwide.

lists.title: Project Consultation
lists.description: Expert factory planning and project consultation — we help you design the most efficient and cost-effective processing plant layout for your investment.

description: <highlight>Serving Global Markets with Proven Expertise</highlight> — We supply high-quality machinery and deliver reliable processing solutions for a wide range of agro-industries, including tapioca, palm oil, corn starch, sweeteners, and rice protein. <highlight>Built on over 30 years of proven industry experience</highlight>, our equipment is engineered with precision and advanced technology to ensure stable performance, efficiency, and long-term operational reliability.

With <highlight>installations in 15+ countries</highlight>, our solutions are widely adopted across Asia, Europe, and Russia, supporting diverse industrial applications. From standalone machines to complete production lines, we provide scalable solutions tailored to meet evolving global demands.
